_prism.purpose: Pre-approves `node` for the base-resume + per-job draft pipelines so the first run in a fresh workspace doesn't hit a denied-by-default permission gate. The agents run a tailored docx-builder script with node; without this, headless mode has no UI to approve the prompt and the DOCX never gets produced.
_prism.safeToEdit: Yes — your own additions to permissions.allow stay if you re-seed (system-files.ts only writes this file when it's absent).
